---
title: "IRTc: Copula-Based Item Response Theory"
author: "Damian Betebenner"
---

# About this thesis

This is the landing page for Damian Betebenner's dissertation, "IRTc: Copula-Based Item Response Theory",
at dataimago (Independent research — educational measurement & psychometrics (dataimago)).

The thesis is rendered via Quarto + XeLaTeX to a PDF whenever you push changes
to `ui/www/` or `R/`. See `docs/thesis.pdf` for the latest build (a stable
copy is committed by the `build-thesis.yml` workflow).

## Chapters

- [Front matter](chapters/00-front-matter.qmd)
- [Introduction](chapters/01-introduction.qmd)
- [Literature review](chapters/02-literature-review.qmd)
- [Methodology](chapters/03-methodology.qmd)
- [Results](chapters/04-results.qmd)
- [Discussion](chapters/05-discussion.qmd)
- [Conclusion](chapters/06-conclusion.qmd)
- [Back matter](chapters/99-back-matter.qmd)

## Formatting

See [`THESIS-CLS-README.md`](THESIS-CLS-README.md) for the 3-mode thesis class
file strategy + how to iterate on your `thesis.cls` for institutional
compliance.
